name: Dollar Dynamics: USD Strength and U.S. Export Competitiveness
description: An analysis of the relationship between the Real Trade Weighted U.S. Dollar Index (RTWEXBGS) and Real Exports of Goods and Services (EXPGS) using quarterly data from FRED. The project tests whether USD appreciation correlates with a decline in exports, with a focus on lag structures and pre/post-2020 structural shifts.

variableMeasured.name: RTWEXBGS
variableMeasured.description: Real Trade Weighted U.S. Dollar Index: Broad, Goods and Services. Monthly index value measuring inflation-adjusted USD strength against major trading-partner currencies.

variableMeasured.name: EXPGS
variableMeasured.description: Real Exports of Goods and Services. Quarterly total inflation-adjusted value of U.S. exports.

isBasedOn.name: Real Trade Weighted U.S. Dollar Index: Broad, Goods and Services (RTWEXBGS)

publisher.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (US) via FRED

isBasedOn.name: Real Exports of Goods and Services (EXPGS)

publisher.name: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) via FRED
